title: Intersex Glow Berries
body:
This pack changes the glow berries and cave vines to be themed after the intersex flag, with a purple ring around the berry and lovely golden leaves.

The golden leaves should make the theming very pleasant for everybody. Happy pride month and after! ^-^


*Do not reupload. If you somehow want to modify or use my assets for something you published, please confirm with me first! =]*
